attachments.codexWarning: Only image and text attachments are supported for Codex turns.
attachments.claudeTitle: Attach files (text, SVG, and supported images)
attachments.claudeWarning: Only text files, including SVG, and PNG, JPEG, GIF, or WEBP images are supported for Claude turns.

configPicker.title: Turn configuration
configPicker.subtitle: Codex thread overrides are applied on the next turn and persisted for later turns.
configPicker.personalityDescription: Set Codex tone for future turns on this thread.
configPicker.personalityUnsupported: The selected model does not advertise personality support. You can still clear an existing override here.
configPicker.serviceTierDescription: Choose the tradeoff between lower latency and flex capacity.
configPicker.outputSchemaDescription: Optional JSON Schema constraint for final assistant responses on this thread.
configPicker.outputSchemaHint: Paste a JSON Schema object or `true`/`false`.
configPicker.approvalPolicyDescription: Optional structured reject object. When set, it overrides the simple approval picker for Codex.
configPicker.invalidApprovalPolicy: Approval policy must be a JSON object.
configPicker.invalidOutputSchemaType: expected a JSON Schema object or boolean
configPicker.invalidOutputSchema: Output schema must be valid JSON Schema object or boolean: {{error}}

runtimePicker.title: Runtime diagnostics
runtimePicker.subtitle: Live Codex app-server capabilities and state from the active transport.
runtimePicker.notLoaded: No runtime diagnostics have been captured yet.
runtimePicker.planModePromptGuided: Plan mode keeps Codex in planning-only mode.
runtimePicker.planModePromptGuidedFallback: Plan mode keeps Codex in planning-only mode.
runtimePicker.planModePromptGuidedUnknown: Plan mode keeps Codex in planning-only mode.
runtimePicker.externalAuthTokensUnsupported: External ChatGPT auth tokens are not supported by Panes. Codex can run, but token refresh must be handled outside the app.

threadPicker.title: Thread tools
threadPicker.subtitle: Browse remote Codex threads or run native history actions on the linked app-server thread.
threadPicker.invalidTurns: Rollback turns must be 1 or greater.
threadPicker.resumeDescription: Browse Codex app-server threads for this workspace and attach one without importing its prior transcript.
threadPicker.resumeUnavailable: Select a workspace and Codex model before browsing remote threads.
threadPicker.remoteHistoryNote: Prior history stays on the server for now. New turns continue on the attached thread.
threadPicker.noRemoteThreads: No matching Codex threads were found for this workspace.
threadPicker.forkDescription: Create a new Codex branch thread from the current server-backed history.
threadPicker.rollbackDescription: Create a new branch thread and remove the latest turns from its local and server history.
threadPicker.rollbackWarning: Rollback does not undo filesystem changes. It only branches the chat history.
threadPicker.compactDescription: Ask Codex to compact the active thread context on the server.

reviewPicker.title: Review
reviewPicker.subtitle: Start a native Codex review turn against the current thread context.
reviewPicker.instructionsPlaceholder: Review the current refactor for regressions and missing tests.

deliveryDescriptions.inline: Run the review on the current thread.
deliveryDescriptions.detached: Run the review on a new Codex review thread.

targetDescriptions.uncommittedChanges: Review staged, unstaged, and untracked changes in the current working tree.
targetDescriptions.baseBranch: Review the changes between the current branch and the selected base branch.
targetDescriptions.commit: Review the changes introduced by one commit.
targetDescriptions.custom: Run a free-form native review request instead of a Git-derived target.

policy.trustedDescription: Broad access with network enabled by default.
policy.standardDescription: Balanced access with network disabled by default.
policy.restrictedDescription: Tight approval handling and constrained execution.
policy.autoClaude: Follow the repo trust defaults for Claude.
policy.autoNetwork: Follow the thread default network policy.
policy.untrustedDescription: Force strict approval handling for the thread.
policy.onFailureDescription: Only stop for approval after a failure.
policy.readOnlyDescription: Allow reads only. No file writes.
policy.workspaceWriteDescription: Allow writes inside the workspace only.
policy.fullAccessDescription: Unrestricted filesystem access for the thread.
policy.enabledDescription: Allow network access for this thread.
policy.networkRestrictedDescription: Block outbound network access for this thread.
policy.claudeSandboxNotice: Claude supports only read-only and workspace-write sandbox modes.
policy.fullAccessNotice: Full access always enables network access.
policy.claudeRestrictedDescription: Most actions require stricter approval handling.

panel.emptyHint: Open a folder and send a message to begin
panel.respondInCard: Respond in the approval card below.
panel.respondInCustomCard: This request requires custom JSON. Respond in the approval card below.
panel.claudeApprovalUnsupported: This Claude approval type is not supported in Panes yet.
panel.setRepoTrusted: Set trusted policy for this repo (on-request approvals, network enabled by request)
panel.setWorkspaceTrusted: Set trusted policy for all repositories (on-request approvals, network enabled by request)
panel.planModeBanner: Plan mode: planning only, no edits or commands.
panel.planModeBannerCodex: Plan mode: planning only, no edits or commands.
panel.planModeBannerCodexFallback: Plan mode: planning only, no edits or commands.
panel.planModeBannerCodexUnknown: Plan mode: planning only, no edits or commands.
panel.planImplementationQuestion: The plan is ready. What should Panes do next?
panel.planImplementationOptionImplementDescrip: Leave plan mode and ask Codex to start executing this plan in the current thread.
panel.planImplementationOptionStayDescription: Keep plan mode enabled so the next message stays in planning mode.

placeholders.plan: Describe what you want to plan...

panel.multipleRepoWriteMessage: This workspace thread can write to multiple repositories ({{repoNames}}). Continue?

toasts.claudeSandboxUnsupported: Claude supports only read-only and workspace-write sandbox modes.
toasts.fullAccessNetworkWarning: Full access sandbox temporarily enables network access.

messageBlocks.outputTruncated: Showing latest action output only (older chunks truncated for performance).
